c.d: Effectiveness of the app's shuffle feature including true randomization, avoidance of repeats, and intelligent song selection
c.s: Google Play Store, YouTube tutorial, Spotify Community

c.d: Ability to create, edit, and manage playlists including linked playlists and import/export options
Support for streaming music from cloud services and casting to devices like Chromecast or Fire TV
Design adaptability, responsiveness on phones and tablets, and user-friendly controls for shuffle and playback
User rating scores and total number of downloads indicative of popularity and user satisfaction
